tEn: Dream to Control: Learning Behaviors by Latent Imagination
tZh: 梦想控制：通过潜在想象学习行为
sEn: Dreamer learns behaviors by imagining future trajectories in a learned world model, achieving state-of-the-art performance on visual control tasks.
sZh: Dreamer通过在学到的世界模型中想象未来轨迹来学习行为，在视觉控制任务上达到了最先进的性能。
absEn: Learned world models summarize an agent's experience to facilitate learning complex behaviors. While learning world models from high-dimensional sensory inputs is becoming feasible through deep learning, there are many potential ways for deriving behaviors from them. We present Dreamer, a reinforcement learning agent that solves long-horizon tasks from images purely by latent imagination. We efficiently learn behaviors by propagating analytic gradients of learned state values back through trajectories imagined in the compact state space of a learned world model. On 20 challenging visual control tasks, Dreamer exceeds existing approaches in data-efficiency, computation time, and final performance.
absZh: 学到的世界模型总结了智能体的经验，以促进复杂行为的学习。虽然通过深度学习从高维感官输入中学习世界模型正变得可行，但从中推导行为有许多潜在方法。我们提出了Dreamer，一个仅通过潜在想象从图像中解决长时域任务的强化学习智能体。我们通过将学到的状态值的解析梯度反向传播通过在一个学到的世界模型的紧凑状态空间中想象的轨迹，来高效地学习行为。在20个具有挑战性的视觉控制任务上，Dreamer在数据效率、计算时间和最终性能方面超越了现有方法。

contrib.en: Proposes Dreamer, a model-based RL agent that learns long-horizon behaviors purely by latent imagination in a compact latent space.
contrib.zh: 提出Dreamer，一种基于模型的强化学习智能体，完全通过在紧凑潜在空间中的潜在想象学习长时域行为。

contrib.en: Introduces an actor-critic algorithm that propagates analytic gradients of multi-step value estimates through learned latent dynamics.
contrib.zh: 引入一种演员-评论家算法，通过学习的潜在动力学传播多步价值估计的解析梯度。

contrib.en: Demonstrates state-of-the-art performance on 20 visual control tasks, exceeding prior methods in data efficiency, computation time, and final score.
contrib.zh: 在20个视觉控制任务上展示最先进性能，在数据效率、计算时间和最终得分上超越先前方法。

contrib.en: Shows that learning a value model in imagination makes the agent robust to the imagination horizon, enabling long-horizon tasks.
contrib.zh: 表明在想象中学习价值模型使智能体对想象时域具有鲁棒性，从而能够处理长时域任务。

contrib.en: Compares representation learning objectives (pixel reconstruction, contrastive estimation, reward prediction) and finds pixel reconstruction most effective.
contrib.zh: 比较表示学习目标（像素重建、对比估计、奖励预测），发现像素重建最有效。

contrib.en: Validates Dreamer on discrete action tasks and early termination scenarios, showing broad applicability.
contrib.zh: 在离散动作任务和提前终止场景上验证Dreamer，展示广泛适用性。

limits.en: Relies on a learned world model that may not generalize to unseen environments or high visual complexity.
limits.zh: 依赖学习的世界模型，可能无法泛化到未见环境或高视觉复杂度。

limits.en: Requires differentiable dynamics and reparameterized sampling, limiting applicability to discrete actions without straight-through gradients.
limits.zh: 需要可微动力学和重参数化采样，限制了在离散动作上的应用（需直通梯度）。

limits.en: Performance depends on the quality of representation learning; pure reward prediction alone was insufficient.
limits.zh: 性能依赖于表示学习质量；仅靠奖励预测是不够的。

limits.en: Imagination horizon and value model hyperparameters may need tuning for different tasks.
limits.zh: 想象时域和价值模型超参数可能需要针对不同任务调整。

limits.en: Evaluation limited to simulated environments; real-world deployment may face additional challenges.
limits.zh: 评估限于模拟环境；实际部署可能面临额外挑战。

items.en: Learned world models summarize an agent’s experience to facilitate learning complex behaviors. While learning world models from high-dimensional sensory inputs is becoming feasible through deep learning, there are many potential ways for deriving behaviors from them. We present Dreamer, a reinforcement learning agent that solves long-horizon tasks from images purely by latent imagination. We efficiently learn behaviors by propagating analytic gradients of learned state values back through trajectories imagined in the compact state space of a learned world model. On 20 challenging visual control tasks, Dreamer exceeds existing approaches in data-efficiency, computation time, and final performance.
items.zh: 学习到的世界模型总结了智能体的经验，以促进复杂行为的学习。虽然通过深度学习从高维感官输入中学习世界模型正变得可行，但从中推导行为有许多潜在方法。我们提出了Dreamer，一个纯粹通过潜在想象从图像中解决长时域任务的强化学习智能体。我们通过将学习到的状态值的解析梯度反向传播回在学习到的世界模型的紧凑状态空间中想象的轨迹，从而高效地学习行为。在20个具有挑战性的视觉控制任务上，Dreamer在数据效率、计算时间和最终性能方面超越了现有方法。

items.capEn: Figure 1: Dreamer learns a world model from past experience and efficiently learns farsighted behaviors in its latent space by backpropagating value estimates back through imagined trajectories.
items.capZh: 图1：Dreamer从过去的经验中学习世界模型，并通过将价值估计反向传播回想象的轨迹，在其潜在空间中高效地学习远见行为。

items.en: Intelligent agents can achieve goals in complex environments even though they never encounter the exact same situation twice. This ability requires building representations of the world from past experience that enable generalization to novel situations. World models offer an explicit way to represent an agent’s knowledge about the world in a parametric model that can make predictions about the future.
items.zh: 智能体能够在复杂环境中实现目标，即使它们从未遇到完全相同的两次情况。这种能力需要从过去的经验中构建世界的表示，从而能够泛化到新情况。世界模型提供了一种显式的方式，将智能体关于世界的知识表示为一个参数化模型，该模型可以对未来进行预测。

items.en: When the sensory inputs are high-dimensional images, latent dynamics models can abstract observations to predict forward in compact state spaces (Watter et al., 2015, Oh et al., 2017, Gregor et al., 2019). Compared to predictions in image space, latent states have a small memory footprint that enables imagining thousands of trajectories in parallel. Learning effective latent dynamics models is becoming feasible through advances in deep learning and latent variable models (Krishnan et al., 2015, Karl et al., 2016, Doerr et al., 2018, Buesing et al., 2018).
items.zh: 当感官输入是高维图像时，潜在动力学模型可以抽象观察，在紧凑的状态空间中进行前向预测（Watter等人，2015；Oh等人，2017；Gregor等人，2019）。与图像空间中的预测相比，潜在状态具有较小的内存占用，可以并行想象数千条轨迹。通过深度学习和潜在变量模型的进步，学习有效的潜在动力学模型正变得可行（Krishnan等人，2015；Karl等人，2016；Doerr等人，2018；Buesing等人，2018）。

items.en: Behaviors can be derived from dynamics models in many ways. Often, imagined rewards are maximized with a parametric policy (Sutton, 1991, Ha and Schmidhuber, 2018, Zhang et al., 2019) or by online planning (Chua et al., 2018, Hafner et al., 2018). However, considering only rewards within a fixed imagination horizon results in shortsighted behaviors (Wang et al., 2019). Moreover, prior work commonly resorts to derivative-free optimization for robustness to model errors (Ebert et al., 2017, Chua et al., 2018, Parmas et al., 2019), rather than leveraging analytic gradients offered by neural network dynamics (Henaff et al., 2019, Srinivas et al., 2018).
items.zh: 行为可以通过多种方式从动力学模型中推导。通常，通过参数化策略（Sutton，1991；Ha和Schmidhuber，2018；Zhang等人，2019）或在线规划（Chua等人，2018；Hafner等人，2018）最大化想象的奖励。然而，仅在固定的想象视野内考虑奖励会导致短视行为（Wang等人，2019）。此外，先前的工作通常采用无导数优化以增强对模型误差的鲁棒性（Ebert等人，2017；Chua等人，2018；Parmas等人，2019），而不是利用神经网络动力学提供的解析梯度（Henaff等人，2019；Srinivas等人，2018）。

items.en: We present Dreamer, an agent that learns long-horizon behaviors from images purely by latent imagination. A novel actor critic algorithm accounts for rewards beyond the imagination horizon while making efficient use of the neural network dynamics. For this, we predict state values and actions in the learned latent space as summarized in Figure 1. The values optimize Bellman consistency for imagined rewards and the policy maximizes the values by propagating their analytic gradients back through the dynamics.
items.zh: 我们提出了Dreamer，一个纯粹通过潜在想象从图像中学习长时域行为的智能体。一种新颖的演员-评论家算法考虑了想象视野之外的奖励，同时高效利用了神经网络动力学。为此，我们在学习到的潜在空间中预测状态值和动作，如图1所示。值函数优化想象奖励的贝尔曼一致性，策略通过将其解析梯度反向传播回动力学来最大化值函数。

items.en: In comparison to actor critic algorithms that learn online or by experience replay (Lillicrap et al., 2015, Mnih et al., 2016, Schulman et al., 2017, Haarnoja et al., 2018, Lee et al., 2019), world models can interpolate past experience and offer analytic gradients of multi-step returns for efficient policy optimization.
items.zh: 与通过在线学习或经验回放学习的演员-评论家算法相比（Lillicrap等人，2015；Mnih等人，2016；Schulman等人，2017；Haarnoja等人，2018；Lee等人，2019），世界模型可以插值过去的经验，并提供多步回报的解析梯度，用于高效策略优化。

items.en: The key contributions of this paper are summarized as follows:
items.zh: 本文的主要贡献总结如下：

items.en: Learning long-horizon behaviors by latent imagination Model-based agents can be shortsighted if they use a finite imagination horizon. We approach this limitation by predicting both actions and state values. Training purely by imagination in a latent space lets us efficiently learn the policy by propagating analytic value gradients back through the latent dynamics.
items.zh: 通过潜在想象学习长时域行为：基于模型的智能体如果使用有限的想象视野可能会短视。我们通过预测动作和状态值来应对这一限制。在潜在空间中纯粹通过想象进行训练，使我们能够通过将解析值梯度反向传播回潜在动力学来高效学习策略。

items.en: Empirical performance for visual control We pair Dreamer with existing representation learning methods and evaluate it on the DeepMind Control Suite with image inputs, illustrated in Figure 2. Using the same hyper parameters for all tasks, Dreamer exceeds previous model-based and model-free agents in terms of data-efficiency, computation time, and final performance.
items.zh: 视觉控制的实证性能：我们将Dreamer与现有的表示学习方法配对，并在DeepMind控制套件上使用图像输入进行评估，如图2所示。对所有任务使用相同的超参数，Dreamer在数据效率、计算时间和最终性能方面超越了之前的基于模型和无模型智能体。

items.en: We formulate visual control as a partially observable Markov decision process (POMDP) with discrete time step t∈[1;T]𝑡1𝑇t\in[1;T], continuous vector-valued actions at∼p​(at​\mido\leqt,a<t)similar-tosubscript𝑎𝑡𝑝subscript𝑎𝑡subscript\mido\leqtsubscript𝑎absent𝑡a_{t}\sim p(a_{t}\mido_{\leqt},a_{<t}) generated by the agent, and high-dimensional observations and scalar rewards ot,rt∼p​(ot,rt​\mido<t,a<t)similar-tosubscript𝑜𝑡subscript𝑟𝑡𝑝subscript𝑜𝑡subscript𝑟𝑡subscript\midoabsent𝑡subscript𝑎absent𝑡o_{t},r_{t}\sim p(o_{t},r_{t}\mido_{<t},a_{<t}) generated by the unknown environment. The goal is to develop an agent that maximizes the expected sum of rewards Ep⁡(∑t=1Trt)subscriptE𝑝superscriptsubscript𝑡1𝑇subscript𝑟𝑡\smash{\mathbb{\operatorname{E}}_{p}\big{(}\sum_{t=1}^{T}r_{t}\big{)}}. Figure 2 shows a selection of our tasks.
items.zh: 我们将视觉控制形式化为一个部分可观测马尔可夫决策过程（POMDP），具有离散时间步t∈[1;T]，由智能体生成的连续向量值动作at∼p(at|o≤t,a<t)，以及由未知环境生成的高维观测和标量奖励ot,rt∼p(ot,rt|o<t,a<t)。目标是开发一个最大化期望奖励总和Ep(∑t=1T rt)的智能体。图2展示了我们任务的一部分。

items.en: The classical components of agents that learn in imagination are dynamics learning, behavior learning, and environment interaction (Sutton, 1991). In the case of Dreamer, the behavior is learned by predicting hypothetical trajectories in the compact latent space of the world model. As outlined in Figure 3 and detailed in Algorithm 1, Dreamer performs the following operations throughout the agent’s life time, either interleaved or in parallel:
items.zh: 在想象中学习的智能体的经典组成部分包括动力学学习、行为学习和环境交互（Sutton，1991）。在Dreamer的情况下，行为是通过在世界模型的紧凑潜在空间中预测假设轨迹来学习的。如图3所示，并在算法1中详细说明，Dreamer在智能体的整个生命周期中执行以下操作，可以交替或并行进行：

items.en: Learning the latent dynamics model from the dataset of past experience to predict future rewards from actions and past observations. Any learning objective for the world model can be incorporated with Dreamer. We review existing methods for learning latent dynamics in Section 4.
items.zh: 从过去经验的数据集中学习潜在动力学模型，以根据动作和过去观测预测未来奖励。任何世界模型的学习目标都可以与Dreamer结合。我们在第4节回顾了学习潜在动力学的现有方法。

items.en: Learning action and value models from predicted latent trajectories, as described in Section 3. The value model optimizes Bellman consistency for imagined rewards and the action model is updated by propagating gradients of value estimates back through the neural network dynamics.
items.zh: 从预测的潜在轨迹中学习动作和值模型，如第3节所述。值模型优化想象奖励的贝尔曼一致性，动作模型通过将值估计的梯度反向传播回神经网络动力学来更新。

items.en: Executing the learned action model in the world to collect new experience for growing the dataset.
items.zh: 在世界中执行学习到的动作模型，以收集新经验来扩充数据集。

items.en: Dreamer uses a latent dynamics model that consists of three components. The representation model encodes observations and actions to create continuous vector-valued model states stsubscript𝑠𝑡s_{t} with Markovian transitions (Watter et al., 2015, Zhang et al., 2019, Hafner et al., 2018). The transition model predicts future model states without seeing the corresponding observations that will later cause them. The reward model predicts the rewards given the model states,
items.zh: Dreamer 使用一个由三个组件组成的潜在动力学模型。表示模型编码观测和动作，以创建具有马尔可夫转移的连续向量值模型状态 s_t（Watter 等人，2015；Zhang 等人，2019；Hafner 等人，2018）。转移模型预测未来的模型状态，而不看到随后会导致这些状态的相应观测。奖励模型根据模型状态预测奖励。

items.en: We use p𝑝p for distributions that generate samples in the real environment and q𝑞q for their approximations that enable latent imagination. Specifically, the transition model lets us predict ahead in the compact latent space without having to observe or imagine the corresponding images. This results in a low memory footprint and fast predictions of thousands of imagined trajectories in parallel.
items.zh: 我们用 p 表示在真实环境中生成样本的分布，用 q 表示它们的近似分布，从而实现潜在想象。具体来说，转移模型让我们能够在紧凑的潜在空间中提前预测，而无需观测或想象相应的图像。这导致了低内存占用和并行快速预测数千条想象轨迹。

items.en: The model mimics a non-linear Kalman filter (Kalman, 1960), latent state space model, or HMM with real-valued states. However, it is conditioned on actions and predicts rewards, allowing the agent to imagine the outcomes of potential action sequences without executing them in the environment.
items.zh: 该模型模仿了非线性卡尔曼滤波器（Kalman，1960）、潜在状态空间模型或具有实值状态的 HMM。然而，它是以动作为条件并预测奖励的，使得智能体能够想象潜在动作序列的结果，而无需在环境中执行它们。

full.secZh: 3 通过潜在想象学习行为

items.capEn: Figure 4: Imagination horizons. We compare the final performance of Dreamer, learning an action model without value prediction, and online planning using PlaNet. Learning a state value model to estimate rewards beyond the imagination horizon makes Dreamer more robust to the horizon length. The agents use pixel reconstruction for representation learning and an action repeat of R=2𝑅2R=2.
items.capZh: 图 4：想象视界。我们比较了 Dreamer（学习动作模型但不进行值预测）、使用 PlaNet 的在线规划以及 Dreamer 的最终性能。学习一个状态值模型来估计想象视界之外的奖励，使得 Dreamer 对视界长度更加鲁棒。智能体使用像素重建进行表示学习，并采用动作重复 R=2。

items.en: Dreamer learns long-horizon behaviors in the compact latent space of a learned world model by efficiently leveraging the neural network latent dynamics. For this, we propagate stochastic gradients of multi-step returns through neural network predictions of actions, states, rewards, and values using reparameterization. This section describes the main contribution of our paper.
items.zh: Dreamer 通过高效利用神经网络潜在动力学，在学到的世界模型的紧凑潜在空间中学习长视界行为。为此，我们使用重参数化，将多步回报的随机梯度通过动作、状态、奖励和值的神经网络预测进行传播。本节描述了我们论文的主要贡献。

items.en: The latent dynamics define a Markov decision process (MDP; Sutton, 1991) that is fully observed because the compact model states stsubscript𝑠𝑡s_{t} are Markovian. We denote imagined quantities with τ𝜏\tau as the time index. Imagined trajectories start at the true model states stsubscript𝑠𝑡s_{t} of observation sequences drawn from the agent’s past experience. They follow predictions of the transition model sτ∼q​(sτ​\midsτ−1,aτ−1)similar-tosubscript𝑠𝜏𝑞subscript𝑠𝜏subscript\mids𝜏1subscript𝑎𝜏1s_{\tau}\sim q(s_{\tau}\mids_{\tau-1},a_{\tau-1}), reward model rτ∼q​(rτ​\midsτ)similar-tosubscript𝑟𝜏𝑞subscript𝑟𝜏subscript\mids𝜏r_{\tau}\sim q(r_{\tau}\mids_{\tau}), and a policy aτ∼q​(aτ​\midsτ)similar-tosubscript𝑎𝜏𝑞subscript𝑎𝜏subscript\mids𝜏a_{\tau}\sim q(a_{\tau}\mids_{\tau}). The objective is to maximize expected imagined rewards Eq⁡(∑τ=t∞γτ−t​rτ)subscriptE𝑞superscriptsubscript𝜏𝑡superscript𝛾𝜏𝑡subscript𝑟𝜏\smash{\mathbb{\operatorname{E}}_{q}\big{(}\sum_{\tau=t}^{\infty}\gamma^{\tau-t}r_{\tau}\big{)}} with respect to the policy.
items.zh: 潜在动力学定义了一个完全可观测的马尔可夫决策过程（MDP；Sutton，1991），因为紧凑的模型状态 s_t 是马尔可夫的。我们用 τ 作为时间索引表示想象量。想象轨迹起始于从智能体过去经验中抽取的观测序列的真实模型状态 s_t。它们遵循转移模型 s_τ ~ q(s_τ | s_{τ-1}, a_{τ-1})、奖励模型 r_τ ~ q(r_τ | s_τ) 和策略 a_τ ~ q(a_τ | s_τ) 的预测。目标是相对于策略最大化期望的想象奖励 E_q(∑_{τ=t}^∞ γ^{τ-t} r_τ)。

items.en: Consider imagined trajectories with a finite horizon H𝐻H. Dreamer uses an actor critic approach to learn behaviors that consider rewards beyond the horizon. We learn an action model and a value model in the latent space of the world model for this. The action model implements the policy and aims to predict actions that solve the imagination environment. The value model estimates the expected imagined rewards that the action model achieves from each state sτsubscript𝑠𝜏s_{\tau},
items.zh: 考虑具有有限视界 H 的想象轨迹。Dreamer 使用演员-评论家方法来学习考虑视界之外奖励的行为。为此，我们在世界模型的潜在空间中学习一个动作模型和一个值模型。动作模型实现策略，旨在预测解决想象环境的动作。值模型估计从每个状态 s_τ 出发动作模型所能达到的期望想象奖励。

items.en: The action and value models are trained cooperatively as typical in policy iteration: the action model aims to maximize an estimate of the value, while the value model aims to match an estimate of the value that changes as the action model changes.
items.zh: 动作模型和值模型按照策略迭代的典型方式合作训练：动作模型旨在最大化值的估计，而值模型旨在匹配随着动作模型变化而变化的值的估计。

items.en: We use dense neural networks for the action and value models with parameters ϕitalic-ϕ\phi and ψ𝜓\psi, respectively. The action model outputs a tanh-transformed Gaussian (Haarnoja et al., 2018) with sufficient statistics predicted by the neural network. This allows for reparameterized sampling (Kingma and Welling, 2013, Rezende et al., 2014) that views sampled actions as deterministically dependent on the neural network output, allowing us to backpropagate analytic gradients through the sampling operation,
items.zh: 我们分别使用参数 φ 和 ψ 的密集神经网络作为动作模型和值模型。动作模型输出一个 tanh 变换的高斯分布（Haarnoja 等人，2018），其充分统计量由神经网络预测。这允许重参数化采样（Kingma 和 Welling，2013；Rezende 等人，2014），将采样动作视为神经网络输出的确定性依赖，使我们能够通过采样操作反向传播解析梯度。

items.en: To learn the action and value models, we need to estimate the state values of imagined trajectories {sτ,aτ,rτ}τ=tt+Hsuperscriptsubscriptsubscript𝑠𝜏subscript𝑎𝜏subscript𝑟𝜏𝜏𝑡𝑡𝐻\{s_{\tau},a_{\tau},r_{\tau}\}_{\tau=t}^{t+H}. These trajectories branch off of the model states stsubscript𝑠𝑡s_{t} of sequence batches drawn from the agent’s dataset of experience and predict forward for the imagination horizon H𝐻H using actions sampled from the action model. State values can be estimated in multiple ways that trade off bias and variance (Sutton and Barto, 2018),
items.zh: 为了学习动作模型和值模型，我们需要估计想象轨迹 {s_τ, a_τ, r_τ}_{τ=t}^{t+H} 的状态值。这些轨迹从智能体经验数据集中抽取的序列批次的模型状态 s_t 分支出来，并使用从动作模型采样的动作向前预测想象视界 H。状态值可以通过多种方式估计，这些方式在偏差和方差之间进行权衡（Sutton 和 Barto，2018）。

items.en: where the expectations are estimated under the imagined trajectories. VRsubscriptVR\mathrm{V}_{\mathrm{R}} simply sums the rewards from τ𝜏\tau until the horizon and ignores rewards beyond it. This allows learning the action model without a value model, an ablation we compare to in our experiments. VNksuperscriptsubscriptVN𝑘\mathrm{V}_{\mathrm{N}}^{k} estimates rewards beyond k𝑘k steps with the learned value model. Dreamer uses VλsubscriptV𝜆\mathrm{V}_{\mathrm{\lambda}}, an exponentially-weighted average of the estimates for different k𝑘k to balance bias and variance. Figure 4 shows that learning a value model in imagination enables Dreamer to solve long-horizon tasks while being robust to the imagination horizon. The experimental details and results on all tasks are described in Section 6.
items.zh: 其中期望在想象轨迹下估计。V_R 简单地将从 τ 到视界的奖励求和，并忽略视界之外的奖励。这允许在没有值模型的情况下学习动作模型，我们在实验中与这种消融进行了比较。V_N^k 使用学到的值模型估计 k 步之后的奖励。Dreamer 使用 V_λ，即不同 k 的估计的指数加权平均，以平衡偏差和方差。图 4 显示，在想象中学习值模型使 Dreamer 能够解决长视界任务，同时对想象视界具有鲁棒性。所有任务的实验细节和结果在第 6 节中描述。

items.en: To update the action and value models, we first compute the value estimates Vλ​(sτ)subscriptV𝜆subscript𝑠𝜏\mathrm{V}_{\mathrm{\lambda}}(s_{\tau}) for all states sτsubscript𝑠𝜏s_{\tau} along the imagined trajectories. The objective for the action model qϕ​(aτ​\midsτ)subscript𝑞italic-ϕsubscript𝑎𝜏subscript\mids𝜏q_{\phi}(a_{\tau}\mids_{\tau}) is to predict actions that result in state trajectories with high value estimates. The objective for the value model vψ​(sτ)subscript𝑣𝜓subscript𝑠𝜏v_{\psi}(s_{\tau}), in turn, is to regress the value estimates,
items.zh: 为了更新动作模型和值模型，我们首先计算沿想象轨迹的所有状态 s_τ 的值估计 V_λ(s_τ)。动作模型 q_φ(a_τ | s_τ) 的目标是预测导致具有高值估计的状态轨迹的动作。值模型 v_ψ(s_τ) 的目标则是回归这些值估计。

items.en: The value model is updated to regress the targets, around which we stop the gradient as typical (Sutton and Barto, 2018). The action model uses analytic gradients through the learned dynamics to maximize the value estimates. To understand this, we note that the value estimates depend on the reward and value predictions, which depend on the imagined states, which in turn depend on the imagined actions. Since all steps are implemented as neural networks, we analytically compute ∇ϕEqθ,qϕ⁡(∑τ=tt+HVλ​(sτ))subscript∇italic-ϕsubscriptEsubscript𝑞𝜃subscript𝑞italic-ϕsuperscriptsubscript𝜏𝑡𝑡𝐻subscriptV𝜆subscript𝑠𝜏\smash{\nabla_{\phi}\mathbb{\operatorname{E}}_{q_{\theta},q_{\phi}}\big{(}\sum_{\tau=t}^{t+H}\mathrm{V}_{\mathrm{\lambda}}(s_{\tau})\big{)}} by stochastic backpropagation (Kingma and Welling, 2013, Rezende et al., 2014). We use reparameterization for continuous actions and latent states and straight-through gradients (Bengio et al., 2013) for discrete actions. The world model is fixed while learning behaviors.
items.zh: 值模型被更新以回归目标，我们像通常一样（Sutton 和 Barto，2018）停止其梯度。动作模型使用通过学到的动力学的解析梯度来最大化值估计。为了理解这一点，我们注意到值估计依赖于奖励和值预测，而奖励和值预测依赖于想象状态，想象状态又依赖于想象动作。由于所有步骤都作为神经网络实现，我们通过随机反向传播（Kingma 和 Welling，2013；Rezende 等人，2014）解析计算 ∇_φ E_{q_θ, q_φ}(∑_{τ=t}^{t+H} V_λ(s_τ))。我们对连续动作和潜在状态使用重参数化，对离散动作使用直通梯度（Bengio 等人，2013）。在学习行为时，世界模型是固定的。

items.en: In tasks with early termination, the world model also predicts the discount factor from each latent state to weigh the time steps in Equations 7 and 8 by the cumulative product of the predicted discount factors, so terms are weighted down based on how likely the imagined trajectory would have ended.
items.zh: 在具有提前终止的任务中，世界模型还从每个潜在状态预测折扣因子，以通过预测折扣因子的累积乘积对公式 7 和 8 中的时间步进行加权，因此根据想象轨迹可能终止的可能性对项进行加权。

full.secZh: 与演员-评论家方法的比较

items.en: Agents using Reinforce gradients (Williams, 1992), such as A3C and PPO (Mnih et al., 2016, Schulman et al., 2017), employ value baselines to reduce gradient variance, while Dreamer backpropagates through the value model. This is similar to deterministic or reparameterized actor critics (Silver et al., 2014), such as DDPG and SAC (Lillicrap et al., 2015, Haarnoja et al., 2018). However, these do not leverage gradients through transitions and only maximize immediate Q-values. MVE and STEVE (Feinberg et al., 2018, Buckman et al., 2018) extend them to multi-step Q-learning with learned dynamics to provide more accurate Q-value targets. We predict state values, which is sufficient for policy optimization since we backpropagate through the dynamics. Refer to Section 5 for a more detailed comparison to related work.
items.zh: 使用 Reinforce 梯度（Williams，1992）的智能体，如 A3C 和 PPO（Mnih 等人，2016；Schulman 等人，2017），采用值基线来减少梯度方差，而 Dreamer 通过值模型反向传播。这类似于确定性或重参数化的演员-评论家（Silver 等人，2014），如 DDPG 和 SAC（Lillicrap 等人，2015；Haarnoja 等人，2018）。然而，这些方法不利用通过转移的梯度，只最大化即时 Q 值。MVE 和 STEVE（Feinberg 等人，2018；Buckman 等人，2018）将它们扩展到具有学到的动力学的多步 Q 学习，以提供更准确的 Q 值目标。我们预测状态值，这对于策略优化是足够的，因为我们通过动力学反向传播。有关与相关工作的更详细比较，请参见第 5 节。

items.capEn: Figure 5: Reconstructions of long-term predictions. We apply the representation model to the first 555 images of two hold-out trajectories and predict forward for 454545 steps using the latent dynamics, given only the actions. The recurrent state space model (RSSM; Hafner et al., 2018) performs accurate long-term predictions, enabling Dreamer to learn successful behaviors in a compact latent space.
items.capZh: 图 5：长期预测的重建。我们将表示模型应用于两个保留轨迹的前 5 张图像，并仅根据动作使用潜在动力学向前预测 45 步。循环状态空间模型（RSSM；Hafner 等人，2018）执行准确的长期预测，使 Dreamer 能够在紧凑的潜在空间中学习成功的行为。

items.capEn: Figure 6: Performance comparison to existing methods. Dreamer inherits the data-efficiency of PlaNet while exceeding the asymptotic performance of the best model-free agents. After 5×1065superscript1065\times 10^{6} environment steps, Dreamer reaches an average performance of 823823823 across tasks, compared to PlaNet at 332332332 and the top model-free D4PG agent at 786786786 after 108superscript10810^{8} steps. Results are averages over 5 seeds.
items.capZh: 图 6：与现有方法的性能比较。Dreamer 继承了 PlaNet 的数据效率，同时超过了最佳无模型智能体的渐近性能。在 5×10^6 环境步后，Dreamer 在所有任务上的平均性能达到 823，而 PlaNet 为 332，最佳无模型 D4PG 智能体在 10^8 步后为 786。结果是 5 次种子的平均值。

items.capEn: Figure 7: Dreamer succeeds at visual control tasks that require long-horizon credit assignment, such as the acrobot and hopper tasks. Optimizing only imagined rewards within the horizon via an action model or by online planning yields shortsighted behaviors that only succeed in reactive tasks, such as in the walker domain. The performance on all 20 tasks is summarized in Figure 6 and training curves are shown in Appendix D. See Tassa et al. (2018) for performance curves of D4PG and A3C.
items.capZh: 图7：Dreamer成功完成了需要长期信用分配的视觉控制任务，例如acrobot和hopper任务。仅通过动作模型或在线规划在视界内优化想象奖励会产生短视行为，仅在反应性任务（如walker域）中成功。所有20个任务的性能总结在图6中，训练曲线见附录D。D4PG和A3C的性能曲线见Tassa等人（2018）。

items.en: Learning behaviors in imagination requires a world model that generalizes well. We focus on latent dynamics models that predict forward in a compact latent space, facilitating long-term predictions and allowing the agent to imagine thousands of trajectories in parallel. Several objectives for learning representations for control have been proposed (Watter et al., 2015, Jaderberg et al., 2016, Oord et al., 2018, Eslami et al., 2018). We review three approaches for learning representations to use with Dreamer: reward prediction, image reconstruction, and contrastive estimation.
items.zh: 在想象中学习行为需要一个泛化良好的世界模型。我们专注于在紧凑的潜在空间中向前预测的潜在动力学模型，这有助于长期预测，并允许智能体并行想象数千条轨迹。已有几种用于控制的学习表示的目标被提出（Watter等人，2015；Jaderberg等人，2016；Oord等人，2018；Eslami等人，2018）。我们回顾了三种与Dreamer一起使用的表示学习方法：奖励预测、图像重建和对比估计。

items.en: Latent imagination requires a representation model p​(st​\midst−1,at−1,ot)𝑝subscript𝑠𝑡subscript\mids𝑡1subscript𝑎𝑡1subscript𝑜𝑡p(s_{t}\mids_{t-1},a_{t-1},o_{t}), transition model q(st\midst−1,at−1,)q(s_{t}\mids_{t-1},a_{t-1},), and reward model q​(rt​\midst)𝑞subscript𝑟𝑡subscript\mids𝑡q(r_{t}\mids_{t}), as described in Section 2. In principle, this could be achieved by simply learning to predict future rewards given actions and past observations (Oh et al., 2017, Gelada et al., 2019, Schrittwieser et al., 2019). With a large and diverse dataset, such representations should be sufficient for solving a control task. However, with a finite dataset and especially when rewards are sparse, learning about observations that correlate with rewards is likely to improve the world model (Jaderberg et al., 2016, Gregor et al., 2019).
items.zh: 潜在想象需要表示模型p(s_t | s_{t-1}, a_{t-1}, o_t)、转移模型q(s_t | s_{t-1}, a_{t-1})和奖励模型q(r_t | s_t)，如第2节所述。原则上，这可以通过简单地学习根据动作和过去观察预测未来奖励来实现（Oh等人，2017；Gelada等人，2019；Schrittwieser等人，2019）。使用大型且多样化的数据集，这样的表示应足以解决控制任务。然而，在有限的数据集下，尤其是当奖励稀疏时，学习与奖励相关的观察可能会改善世界模型（Jaderberg等人，2016；Gregor等人，2019）。

items.en: We first describe the world model used by PlaNet (Hafner et al., 2018) that learns latent dynamics by reconstructing images as shown in Figure 3(a). The world model consists of the following components, where the observation model is only used to provide a learning signal,
items.zh: 我们首先描述PlaNet（Hafner等人，2018）使用的世界模型，该模型通过重建图像来学习潜在动力学，如图3(a)所示。世界模型由以下组件组成，其中观察模型仅用于提供学习信号：

items.en: The components are optimized jointly to increase the variational lower bound (ELBO; Jordan et al., 1999) or more generally the variational information bottleneck (VIB; Tishby et al., 2000, Alemi et al., 2016). As derived in Appendix B, the bound includes reconstruction terms for observations and rewards and a KL regularizer. The expectation is taken under the dataset and representation model,
items.zh: 这些组件联合优化以增加变分下界（ELBO；Jordan等人，1999）或更一般的变分信息瓶颈（VIB；Tishby等人，2000；Alemi等人，2016）。如附录B所推导，该界包括观察和奖励的重建项以及KL正则化项。期望在数据集和表示模型下计算：

items.en: We implement the transition model as a recurrent state space model (RSSM; Hafner et al., 2018), the representation model by combining the RSSM with a convolutional neural network (CNN; LeCun et al., 1989) applied to the image observation, the observation model as a transposed CNN, and the reward model as a dense network. The combined parameter vector θ𝜃\theta is updated by stochastic backpropagation (Kingma and Welling, 2013, Rezende et al., 2014). Figure 5 shows video predictions of this model. We refer to Appendix A and Hafner et al. (2018) model details.
items.zh: 我们将转移模型实现为循环状态空间模型（RSSM；Hafner等人，2018），表示模型通过将RSSM与应用于图像观察的卷积神经网络（CNN；LeCun等人，1989）结合，观察模型实现为转置CNN，奖励模型实现为密集网络。组合参数向量θ通过随机反向传播更新（Kingma和Welling，2013；Rezende等人，2014）。图5显示了该模型的视频预测。我们参考附录A和Hafner等人（2018）的模型细节。

items.en: Predicting pixels can require high model capacity. We can also encourage mutual information between model states and observations by instead predicting the states from the images (Guo et al., 2018). This replaces the observation model with a state model,
items.zh: 预测像素可能需要高模型容量。我们也可以通过从图像预测状态来鼓励模型状态与观察之间的互信息（Guo等人，2018）。这将观察模型替换为状态模型：

items.en: While the reconstruction objective used the fact that the observation marginal is a constant, we now face the state marginal. As shown in Appendix B, this can be estimated via noise contrastive estimation (NCE; Gutmann and Hyvärinen, 2010, Oord et al., 2018) by averaging the state model over observations o′superscript𝑜′o^{\prime} of the current sequence batch. Intuitively, q​(st​\midot)𝑞subscript𝑠𝑡subscript\mido𝑡q(s_{t}\mido_{t}) makes the state predictable from the current image while ln​∑o′q​(st​\mido′)subscriptsuperscript𝑜′𝑞subscript𝑠𝑡superscript\mido′\ln\sum_{o^{\prime}}q(s_{t}\mido^{\prime}) keeps it diverse to prevent collapse,
items.zh: 虽然重建目标利用了观察边缘是常数的事实，但现在我们面临状态边缘。如附录B所示，这可以通过噪声对比估计（NCE；Gutmann和Hyvärinen，2010；Oord等人，2018）来估计，方法是对当前序列批次中的观察o'的状态模型进行平均。直观上，q(s_t | o_t)使状态可从当前图像预测，而ln∑_{o'} q(s_t | o')保持多样性以防止崩溃：

items.en: We implement the state model as a CNN and again optimize the bound with respect to the combined parameter vector θ𝜃\theta using stochastic backpropagation. While avoiding pixel prediction, the amount of information this bound can extract efficiently is limited (McAllester and Statos, 2018). We empirically compare reward, reconstruction, and contrastive objectives in our experiments in Figure 8.
items.zh: 我们将状态模型实现为CNN，并再次使用随机反向传播相对于组合参数向量θ优化该界。虽然避免了像素预测，但该界能有效提取的信息量有限（McAllester和Statos，2018）。我们在图8的实验中实证比较了奖励、重建和对比目标。

items.en: Prior works learn latent dynamics for visual control by derivative-free policy learning or online planning, augment model-free agents with multi-step predictions, or use analytic gradients of Q-values or multi-step rewards, often for low-dimensional tasks. In comparison, Dreamer uses analytic gradients to efficiently learn long-horizon behaviors for visual control purely by latent imagination.
items.zh: 先前的工作通过无导数策略学习或在线规划学习用于视觉控制的潜在动力学，通过多步预测增强无模型智能体，或使用Q值或多步奖励的解析梯度，通常用于低维任务。相比之下，Dreamer使用解析梯度高效地学习仅通过潜在想象进行视觉控制的长期行为。

full.secZh: 基于潜在动力学的控制

items.en: E2C (Watter et al., 2015) and RCE (Banijamali et al., 2017) embed images to predict forward in a compact space to solve simple tasks. World Models (Ha and Schmidhuber, 2018) learn latent dynamics in a two-stage process to evolve linear controllers in imagination. PlaNet (Hafner et al., 2018) learns them jointly and solves visual locomotion tasks by latent online planning. SOLAR (Zhang et al., 2019) solves robotic tasks via guided policy search in latent space. I2A (Weber et al., 2017) hands imagined trajectories to a model-free policy, while Lee et al. (2019) and Gregor et al. (2019) learn belief representations to accelerate model-free agents.
items.zh: E2C（Watter等人，2015）和RCE（Banijamali等人，2017）将图像嵌入到紧凑空间中向前预测以解决简单任务。World Models（Ha和Schmidhuber，2018）通过两阶段过程学习潜在动力学，以在想象中演化线性控制器。PlaNet（Hafner等人，2018）联合学习它们并通过潜在在线规划解决视觉运动任务。SOLAR（Zhang等人，2019）通过潜在空间中的引导策略搜索解决机器人任务。I2A（Weber等人，2017）将想象轨迹交给无模型策略，而Lee等人（2019）和Gregor等人（2019）学习信念表示以加速无模型智能体。

items.en: VPN (Oh et al., 2017), MVE (Feinberg et al., 2018), and STEVE (Buckman et al., 2018) learn dynamics for multi-step Q-learning from a replay buffer. AlphaGo (Silver et al., 2017) combines predictions of actions and state values with planning, assuming access to the true dynamics. Also assuming access to the dynamics, POLO (Lowrey et al., 2018) plans to explore by learning a value ensemble. MuZero (Schrittwieser et al., 2019) learns task-specific reward and value models to solve challenging tasks but requires large amounts of experience. PETS (Chua et al., 2018), VisualMPC (Ebert et al., 2017), and PlaNet (Hafner et al., 2018) plan online using derivative-free optimization. POPLIN (Wang and Ba, 2019) improves over online planning by self-imitation. Piergiovanni et al. (2018) learn robot policies by imagination with a latent dynamics model. Planning with neural network gradients was shown on small problems (Schmidhuber, 1990, Henaff et al., 2018) but has been challenging to scale (Parmas et al., 2019).
items.zh: VPN（Oh等人，2017）、MVE（Feinberg等人，2018）和STEVE（Buckman等人，2018）从回放缓冲区学习用于多步Q学习的动力学。AlphaGo（Silver等人，2017）将动作和状态值的预测与规划相结合，假设可以访问真实动力学。同样假设可以访问动力学，POLO（Lowrey等人，2018）通过学习值集成进行规划以探索。MuZero（Schrittwieser等人，2019）学习任务特定的奖励和值模型以解决具有挑战性的任务，但需要大量经验。PETS（Chua等人，2018）、VisualMPC（Ebert等人，2017）和PlaNet（Hafner等人，2018）使用无导数优化进行在线规划。POPLIN（Wang和Ba，2019）通过自模仿改进了在线规划。Piergiovanni等人（2018）通过潜在动力学模型的想象学习机器人策略。使用神经网络梯度的规划已在小型问题上展示（Schmidhuber，1990；Henaff等人，2018），但难以扩展（Parmas等人，2019）。

items.en: DPG (Silver et al., 2014), DDPG (Lillicrap et al., 2015), and SAC (Haarnoja et al., 2018) leverage gradients of learned immediate action values to learn a policy by experience replay. SVG (Heess et al., 2015) reduces the variance of model-free on-policy algorithms by analytic value gradients of one-step model predictions. Concurrent work by Byravan et al. (2019) uses latent imagination with deterministic models for navigation and manipulation tasks. ME-TRPO (Kurutach et al., 2018) accelerates an otherwise model-free agent via gradients of predicted rewards for proprioceptive inputs. DistGBP (Henaff et al., 2017; 2019) uses model gradients for online planning in simple tasks.
items.zh: DPG（Silver等人，2014）、DDPG（Lillicrap等人，2015）和SAC（Haarnoja等人，2018）利用学习到的即时动作值的梯度，通过经验回放学习策略。SVG（Heess等人，2015）通过一步模型预测的解析值梯度降低了无模型在策略算法的方差。Byravan等人（2019）的并行工作使用确定性模型的潜在想象进行导航和操作任务。ME-TRPO（Kurutach等人，2018）通过预测奖励的梯度加速了原本无模型的智能体，用于本体感受输入。DistGBP（Henaff等人，2017；2019）在简单任务中使用模型梯度进行在线规划。

items.capEn: Figure 8: Comparison of representation learning objectives to be used with Dreamer. Pixel reconstruction performs best for the majority of tasks. The contrastive objective solves about half of the tasks, while predicting rewards alone was not sufficient in our experiments. The results suggest that future developments in learning representations are likely to translate into improved task performance for Dreamer. The performance curves for all tasks are included in Appendix E.
items.capZh: 图8：与Dreamer一起使用的表示学习目标的比较。像素重建在大多数任务中表现最佳。对比目标解决了大约一半的任务，而仅预测奖励在我们的实验中不足。结果表明，表示学习的未来发展可能会转化为Dreamer任务性能的提升。所有任务的性能曲线见附录E。

items.en: We experimentally evaluate Dreamer on a variety of control tasks. We designed the experiments to compare Dreamer to current best methods in the literature, and to evaluate its ability to solve tasks with long horizons, continuous actions, discrete actions, and early termination. We further compare the orthogonal choice of learning objective for the world model. The source code for all our experiments and videos of Dreamer are available at https://danijar.com/dreamer.
items.zh: 我们在各种控制任务上实验评估Dreamer。我们设计实验以将Dreamer与文献中当前最佳方法进行比较，并评估其解决具有长视界、连续动作、离散动作和早期终止的任务的能力。我们进一步比较了世界模型的学习目标的正交选择。所有实验的源代码和Dreamer的视频可在https://danijar.com/dreamer获取。

items.en: We evaluate Dreamer on 20 visual control tasks of the DeepMind Control Suite Tassa et al. (2018), illustrated in Figure 2. These tasks pose a variety of challenges, including sparse rewards, contact dynamics, and 3D scenes. We selected the tasks on which Tassa et al. (2018) report non-zero performance from image inputs. Agent observations are images of shape 64×64×36464364\times 64\times 3, actions range from 111 to 121212 dimensions, rewards range from 00 to 111, episodes last for 100010001000 steps and have randomized initial states. We use a fixed action repeat of R=2𝑅2R=2 across tasks. We further evaluate the applicability of Dreamer to discrete actions and early termination on a subset of Atari games (Bellemare et al., 2013) and DeepMind Lab levels (Beattie et al., 2016) as detailed in Appendix C.
items.zh: 我们在DeepMind Control Suite（Tassa等人，2018）的20个视觉控制任务上评估Dreamer，如图2所示。这些任务提出了各种挑战，包括稀疏奖励、接触动力学和3D场景。我们选择了Tassa等人（2018）报告从图像输入获得非零性能的任务。智能体观察为64×64×3形状的图像，动作维度从1到12，奖励范围从0到1，情节持续1000步，初始状态随机。我们在所有任务中使用固定的动作重复R=2。我们进一步在Atari游戏子集（Bellemare等人，2013）和DeepMind Lab关卡（Beattie等人，2016）上评估Dreamer对离散动作和早期终止的适用性，详见附录C。

items.en: Our implementation uses TensorFlow Probability (Dillon et al., 2017). We use a single Nvidia V100 GPU and 10 CPU cores for each training run. The training time for our Dreamer implementation is about 333 hours per 106superscript10610^{6} environment steps on the control suite, compared to 111111 hours for online planning using PlaNet, and the 242424 hours used by D4PG to reach similar performance. We use the same hyper parameters across all continuous tasks, and similarly across all discrete tasks, detailed in Appendix A. The world models are learned via reconstruction unless specified.
items.zh: 我们的实现使用TensorFlow Probability（Dillon等人，2017）。每次训练运行使用单个Nvidia V100 GPU和10个CPU核心。我们的Dreamer实现在控制套件上的训练时间约为每10^6环境步3小时，而使用PlaNet进行在线规划为11小时，D4PG达到类似性能需要24小时。我们在所有连续任务中使用相同的超参数，同样在所有离散任务中，详见附录A。除非另有说明，世界模型通过重建学习。

items.en: The highest reported performance on the continuous tasks is achieved by D4PG (Barth-Maron et al., 2018), an improved variant of DDPG (Lillicrap et al., 2015) that uses distributed collection, distributional Q-learning, multi-step returns, and prioritized replay. We include the scores for D4PG with pixel inputs and A3C (Mnih et al., 2016) with state inputs from Tassa et al. (2018). PlaNet (Hafner et al., 2018) learns the same world model as Dreamer and selects actions via online planning without an action model and drastically improves over D4PG and A3C in data efficiency. We re-run PlaNet with R=2𝑅2R=2 for a unified experimental setup. For Atari, we show the final performance of SimPLe (Kaiser et al., 2019), DQN (Mnih et al., 2015) and Rainbow (Hessel et al., 2018) reported by Castro et al. (2018), and for DeepMind Lab that of IMPALA (Espeholt et al., 2018) as a guideline.
items.zh: 连续任务上报告的最高性能由D4PG（Barth-Maron等人，2018）实现，它是DDPG（Lillicrap等人，2015）的改进变体，使用分布式收集、分布式Q学习、多步回报和优先回放。我们包含了来自Tassa等人（2018）的D4PG像素输入和A3C（Mnih等人，2016）状态输入的分数。PlaNet（Hafner等人，2018）学习与Dreamer相同的世界模型，并通过在线规划选择动作，没有动作模型，在数据效率上大幅优于D4PG和A3C。我们重新运行PlaNet，设置R=2以实现统一的实验设置。对于Atari，我们展示了SimPLe（Kaiser等人，2019）、DQN（Mnih等人，2015）和Rainbow（Hessel等人，2018）的最终性能，由Castro等人（2018）报告；对于DeepMind Lab，展示了IMPALA（Espeholt等人，2018）作为参考。

items.en: To evaluate the performance of Dreamer, we compare it to state-of-the-art reinforcement learning agents. The results are summarized in Figure 6. With an average score of 823823823 across tasks after 5×1065superscript1065\times 10^{6} environment steps, Dreamer exceeds the performance of the strong model-free D4PG agent that achieves an average of 786786786 within 108superscript10810^{8} environment steps. At the same time, Dreamer inherits the data-efficiency of PlaNet, confirming that the learned world model can help to generalize from small amounts of experience. The empirical success of Dreamer shows that learning behaviors by latent imagination with world models can outperform top methods based on experience replay.
items.zh: 为了评估Dreamer的性能，我们将其与最先进的强化学习智能体进行比较。结果总结在图6中。在5×10^6环境步后，Dreamer在所有任务上的平均得分为823，超过了强大的无模型D4PG智能体在10^8环境步内达到的平均786分。同时，Dreamer继承了PlaNet的数据效率，证实了学习到的世界模型有助于从少量经验中泛化。Dreamer的经验成功表明，通过世界模型进行潜在想象学习行为可以优于基于经验回放的最佳方法。

items.en: To investigate its ability to learn long-horizon behaviors, we compare Dreamer to alternatives for deriving behaviors from the world model at various horizon lengths. For this, we learn an action model to maximize imagined rewards without a value model and compare to online planning using PlaNet. Figure 4 shows the final performance for different imagination horizons, confirming that the value model makes Dreamer more robust to the horizon and performs well even for short horizons. Performance curves for all 19 tasks with horizon of 20 are shown in Appendix D, where Dreamer outperforms the alternatives on 16 of 20 tasks, with 4 ties.
items.zh: 为了研究其学习长期行为的能力，我们将Dreamer与从世界模型推导行为的替代方法在不同视界长度下进行比较。为此，我们学习一个动作模型以最大化想象奖励，而不使用值模型，并与使用PlaNet的在线规划进行比较。图4显示了不同想象视界下的最终性能，证实了值模型使Dreamer对视界更鲁棒，即使在短视界下也表现良好。所有19个任务在视界为20时的性能曲线见附录D，其中Dreamer在20个任务中的16个上优于替代方法，4个持平。

items.en: Dreamer can be used with any differentiable dynamics model that predicts future rewards given actions and past observations. Since the representation learning objective is orthogonal to our algorithm, we compare three natural choices described in Section 4: pixel reconstruction, contrastive estimation, and pure reward prediction. Figure 8 shows clear differences in task performance for different representation learning approaches, with pixel reconstruction outperforming contrastive estimation on most tasks. This suggests that future improvements in representation learning are likely to translate to higher task performance with Dreamer. Reward prediction alone was not sufficient in our experiments. Further ablations are included in the appendix of the paper.
items.zh: Dreamer 可以与任何可微分的动力学模型一起使用，该模型根据动作和过去的观测预测未来的奖励。由于表示学习目标与我们的算法正交，我们比较了第 4 节中描述的三种自然选择：像素重建、对比估计和纯奖励预测。图 8 显示了不同表示学习方法在任务性能上的明显差异，其中像素重建在大多数任务上优于对比估计。这表明表示学习的未来改进很可能转化为使用 Dreamer 的更高任务性能。在我们的实验中，仅靠奖励预测是不够的。进一步的消融实验包含在论文的附录中。

items.en: We present Dreamer, an agent that learns long-horizon behaviors purely by latent imagination. For this, we propose an actor critic method that optimizes a parametric policy by propagating analytic gradients of multi-step values back through learned latent dynamics. Dreamer outperforms previous methods in data-efficiency, computation time, and final performance on a variety of challenging continuous control tasks with image inputs. We further show that Dreamer is applicable to tasks with discrete actions and early episode termination. Future research on representation learning can likely scale latent imagination to environments of higher visual complexity.
items.zh: 我们提出了 Dreamer，一个纯粹通过潜在想象来学习长时域行为的智能体。为此，我们提出了一种演员-评论家方法，通过将多步值的解析梯度反向传播通过学到的潜在动力学来优化参数化策略。Dreamer 在数据效率、计算时间和最终性能方面优于先前的方法，适用于多种具有图像输入的挑战性连续控制任务。我们进一步表明 Dreamer 适用于具有离散动作和早期回合终止的任务。未来关于表示学习的研究很可能将潜在想象扩展到视觉复杂度更高的环境。

items.en: We thank Simon Kornblith, Benjamin Eysenbach, Ian Fischer, Amy Zhang, Geoffrey Hinton, Shane Gu, Adam Kosiorek, Brandon Amos, Jacob Buckman, Calvin Luo, and Rishabh Agarwal, and our anonymous reviewers for feedback and discussions. We thank Yuval Tassa for adding the quadruped environment to the control suite.
items.zh: 我们感谢 Simon Kornblith、Benjamin Eysenbach、Ian Fischer、Amy Zhang、Geoffrey Hinton、Shane Gu、Adam Kosiorek、Brandon Amos、Jacob Buckman、Calvin Luo 和 Rishabh Agarwal，以及我们的匿名审稿人提供的反馈和讨论。我们感谢 Yuval Tassa 将四足动物环境添加到控制套件中。
